subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from God, the All-Protecting, the Self-Subsisting, unto him who hath been named after the Spirit in the Kingdom of his Lord, the Mighty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من الله المهیمن القیوم الی الذی سمی باسم الروح فی ملکوت ربه العزیز
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
